intent: Sweep fixture (MIN) for 1s_2br_wd_front_back_split_bath_hall_ld -- 12x9 m lot, 40 m2 buildable floor (8x5 envelope). The shallowest lot that solves on this topology (0 warn), sitting right at its buildable-depth floor of ~5 m; smallest floor area of the feasible sizes. Used instead of 11x9 (requested), which is below the minimum and falls back to the vertical-split hall sibling. Full LDK front, bedrooms + central hall notch across the rear.
